__data__.text:
AetherForge MAAP-1 Modular Autonomous Aerial Platform Swarm System

The MAAP-1 is a heavy-lift unmanned helicopter designed for modular operations. It supports firefighting (water/retardant), military logistics, and ISR missions. The system can operate autonomously in swarms and uses mobile 18-wheeler trailer bases for launch, recovery, and maintenance.

      "change_id": "ECR-001",
      "description": "The MAAP-1 Swarm System's autonomous navigation system requires improvement to enhance situational awareness and group formation accuracy in dynamic and complex environments. This is particularly crucial for wildfire response missions where terrain can rapidly change and group formation is critical for effective containment. For military logistics and ISR missions, improved situational awareness enables more efficient and secure transport of personnel and cargo.",
      "affected_parts": [
        "AER-1001: MAAP-1 Swarm System's Autonomous Navigation Computer",
        "SFR-5000: Firefighting Modular Payload's LIDAR Module",
        "LOG-2000: Logistics Modular Payload's GPS Receiver",
        "ISR-3000: ISR Modular Payload's Sensor Suite"
      ],
      "reason": "To improve the MAAP-1 Swarm System's performance in dynamic and complex environments, reducing the risk of collision and improving mission effectiveness.",
      "proposed_solution": "Implement a 3D mapping and terrain analysis algorithm that utilizes real-time sensor data from the MAAP-1 Swarm System's onboard sensors and external data sources.

      "proposed_solution": "Implement a 3D mapping and terrain analysis algorithm that utilizes real-time sensor data from the MAAP-1 Swarm System's onboard sensors and external data sources. This will enable more accurate terrain awareness and group formation, even in high-stress and rapidly changing environments."
